violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in truck noted blocked with fan and onions. Items removed from handsink to correct the violation.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted blocked with garbage and a folding chair.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of beef and other prepared foods was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the upright cooler and in the chest freezer.
